# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3.8'

networks:
  elk_network:

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: elasticsearch:7.17.14
    networks:
      - elk_network

  logstash:
    image: logstash:7.17.14
    volumes:
      - ./logstash.conf:/usr/share/logstash/conf/logstash.conf:ro
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk_network

  kibana:
    image: kibana:7.17.14
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk_network

  apm-server:
    image: elastic/apm-server:8.10.2
    networks:
      - elk_network
    volumes:
      - ./apm-server.yml:/usr/share/apm-server/apm-server.yml:ro
```
